description: Line 30 of lib.rs has a comment in the crate-level example: `// try_sign returns Result; sign panics on error (see ## Panics).` There is no `## Panics` section in the module-level documentation. The `# Panics` sections exist only on the per-method `try_sign` docs. The cross-reference is a dead link that will confuse readers and will render as a broken intra-doc reference. Fix: either add a `## Panics` section to the crate-level doc, or change the comment to say `(panics on error — see each method's Panics section)` or similar.
title: Module doc refers to nonexistent Panics section
